question: How many days ago did I launch my website when I signed a contract with my first client?
ground_truth_answer: 19 days ago. 20 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

retrieval_results.context:
User has launched a new website and created a business plan outline, and wants their social media strategy to align with this overall business strategy
User will promote a branding project checklist lead magnet via social media and email signature, using existing Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn following, eye‑catching graphics, a link in email signature, and value posts with hashtags; later guest blogging and paid ads; delivery via Mailchimp
User is developing a content calendar for their social media channels to consistently post engaging content that attracts potential clients
User decided to share a key takeaway with a visual on Facebook, featuring an image that demonstrates the impact of typography on design, and will include hashtags such as #typography, #designprinciples, #graphicdesign, #uxdesign, and #designinspiration
User plans to track analytics for their posts, adjust their content strategy based on performance, and engage with audience by responding to comments and direct messages
User will create an Instagram post consisting of a visual summary—a series of images illustrating the importance of typography in design—and plans to add additional visuals to make the series more comprehensive
User intends to repurpose a blog post about design principles and fundamentals into a Facebook post and an Instagram post, using the same content across channels
User plans to focus their educational content theme on design principles and fundamentals, specifically typography, to establish themselves as an expert in graphic design
